package.title: Sensor Control Unit 2
package.customer_Kunde: Mack (Mack Rides) — RESOLVED (layout reader's 'Mack vs Mark' settled: sheets 3/5/6/7 all print 'Mack' clearly)
package.unit_chain: +SCU1 -> +SCU2(this) -> +SCU3 (three sensor-control cabinets daisy-chained for both power (L/N/PE/UL/UN via W5443/W5471) and EtherCAT/LAN (via W5445/W5473))
package.of_von_field: 1706 (printed as the 'von' value on every sheet: Blatt 3/4/5/6/7 all read 'von 1706'; verified on sheet 7 corner. Unusually high for a page count — may be an order/document code rather than a literal sheet total; recorded as printed, meaning flagged in unresolved)

sheets.note: not re-photographed by adjudicator; carried from reader, cross-refs reciprocate with verified sheets 3 & 5

sheets.function: PLC overview (EtherCAT node EK1100 + EL terminals A100-A107)
PLC overview (I/O map: A101 DO / A102-A103 DI / A104 RTD)
PLC overview (230 VAC DI: A105/A106 EL1722, ME05-ME08 Klixon)
sheets.note: Blatt cell VERIFIED from pixels as 'Blatt 7 / von 1706' — the reader's 'Blatt 5 / two superimposed drawings' was a bleed-through/exposure artifact; at normal exposure this is a single, clean drawing (upper ~60% blank).
hand-colored render/photo; NO device tags legible anywhere in the drawing area

package.adjudicator_note: Merged from 6 blind per-sheet reads; every cross-sheet conflict was re-opened at full resolution and decided from pixels (crops in scratchpad). Voltage domains, module lineup, PE architecture, EtherCAT path, heater chain and all off-page grid targets were pixel-verified except sheet 4 (no conflict; carried) and the layout (no tags).

devices.detail: 'UPS Supply', B10A/2pol, MOE.132702 (Moeller/Eaton). 2-pole, ganged (dashed link). Fed from the UPS potentials UL/UN; output = USVL1/USVN to sheet 4.
devices.evidence: Sheet 3: blue text '-3/F1 / UPS Supply / B10A/2pol / MOE.132702' beside a 2-pole breaker; VERIFIED at full res the two poles are fed by the wires from X0:2 (UL) and X0:N2 (UN).

devices.detail: 'Heating' (Heizung), B10A/2pol, MOE.132702. 2-pole. Upper pole fed from L; output feeds the common line of the two climate controllers S10 (hygrostat) and S11 (thermostat). Second pole carries the heater neutral.
devices.evidence: Sheet 3: '-3/F2 / Heating / B10A/2pol / MOE.132702' beside a 2-pole breaker; VERIFIED F2 upper pole (term 1 in / term 2 out) drives a vertical bus to S10:3 and S11.

devices.detail: Rittal RIT.3118.000 hygrostat, dashed-outline sub-assembly. Terminals 1='Drying', 2='Humidif.' (switched outputs, destinations not on this sheet), 3='L' (common in, from F2).
devices.evidence: Sheet 3: '-3/S10 / RIT.3118.000'; terminal labels 'Drying'(1), 'Humidif.'(2), '3' with the F2 line arriving at 3 (verified).

devices.detail: Rittal thermostat, printed 'RIT.3110000' (catalog form RIT.3110.000 — a dot appears dropped in print/scan). Dashed sub-assembly. Bottom terminals 3='Heating' (switched line out to heater) and 4='Cooling' (unused stub). Top-row terminal NUMBERS 5,6,7,1,2 legible; their function micro-labels NOT legible (one carries the F2 common feed).
devices.evidence: Sheet 3: '-3/S11 / RIT.3110000'; VERIFIED bottom labels '3 Heating' / '4 Cooling' and top numerals '5 6 7 1 2'; wire from term 3 (Heating) runs left to X1:1.

devices.detail: Anti-condensation heater, 250W-115V ('L Heizung'). Three leads: L, N, PE.
devices.evidence: Sheet 3: heater symbol labelled '-3/E1 / 250W-115V' + 'L Heizung'; VERIFIED L->X1:1, N->X1:N, PE->X1:PE with the green PE loop separate from the L/N path.

devices.detail: 24 VDC switch-mode PSU, 2.5 A, PXC.2909576 (Phoenix Contact article). MODEL NAME (STEP-PS/1AC/24DC/2.5) is INFERRED from the article number, NOT printed. AC in (L/N from USV), DC out (+24V / 0V).
devices.evidence: Sheet 4 reader: PSU block '-4/G1 / 2,5 A / PXC.2909576', pins L/N top, -/+ bottom. Not re-shot by adjudicator (no conflict).

devices.detail: 'Temperature Switches', B2 2pol, MOE.132695. Thermostatic cutout in the USV/230V line feeding X2. Pole 1 (1-2) in the line path; pole 2 (3-4) reads as open stubs on the sheet.
devices.evidence: Sheet 4 reader: '-4/F3 / Temperature Switches / B2, 2pol / MOE.132695', two ganged switch symbols. Not re-shot (no conflict).

devices.detail: Beckhoff EK1100 EtherCAT bus coupler — head of the E-bus stack. Network ports ETH In / ETH Out; power terminals 24V, 0V, +, -, PE. ('-5/' prefix = sheet-5 PLC-overview location marker used on every PLC sheet.)
devices.evidence: Sheet 5: dashed box '-5/A100' with vertical 'EK1100', ports 'ETH In'/'ETH Out', bottom row '24V 0V + - PE'. VERIFIED.

devices.detail: Beckhoff EL2008, 8-Kanal Digital Ausgangsklemmen (DO8x24VDC/0.5A). Outputs A1.0-A1.7. Overview on sheet 5; I/O detail on sheet 6 (/6.4).
devices.evidence: Sheet 5 '-5/A101 / EL2008 / 8-Kanal Digital Ausgangsklemmen'; Sheet 6 '-5/A101 / EL2008 / DO8x24VDC/0.5A'. VERIFIED both.

devices.detail: Beckhoff EL1008, 8-channel DI (DI8x24VDC). Occupancy inputs (SensorUnit 5-8 occupied + Occupied Upstream). Detail sheet 6 (/6.4), channel refs /9.x.
devices.evidence: Sheet 5 '-5/A102 / EL1008 / 8 Kanal Digital Eingangsklemme'; Sheet 6 '-5/A102 / EL1008 / DI8x24VDC'. VERIFIED.

devices.detail: Beckhoff EL1008, 8-channel DI (DI8x24VDC). Broken-sensor inputs (SensorUnit 5-8 Broken + Occupied Downstream + Position Bit 1/2/3). Detail sheet 6 (/6.4), channel refs /10.x.
devices.evidence: Sheet 5 '-5/A103 / EL1008 / 8 Kanal Digital Eingangsklemme'; Sheet 6 '-5/A103 / EL1008 / DI8x24VDC'. VERIFIED.

devices.detail: Beckhoff EL3204, 4-channel PT100/RTD analog input (4AI RTD). Reads RTDs of ME05-ME08 as PEW100/102/104/106. Detail sheet 6 (/6.4), channel refs /11.x.
devices.evidence: Sheet 5 '-5/A104 / EL 3204 / 4Kanal Eingangsklemme PT100 (RTD)'; Sheet 6 '-5/A104 / EL 3204 / 4AI, RTD'. VERIFIED.

devices.detail: Beckhoff EL1722, 2-channel 120...230 VAC digital input (DI2x120...230VAC). Reads ME05 & ME06 Klixon thermal switches as E3.0 / E3.1. Detail sheet 7 (/7.4), wire refs /12.x.
devices.evidence: Sheet 5 '-5/A105 / EL1722 / 2 Kanal Digital Eingang 230V / DI2x120...230VAC'; Sheet 7 detail VERIFIED at full res.

devices.detail: Beckhoff EL1722, 2-channel 120...230 VAC digital input. Reads ME07 & ME08 Klixon thermal switches as E4.0 / E4.1. Detail sheet 7 (/7.4), wire refs /12.x.
devices.evidence: Sheet 5 '-5/A106 / EL1722 / DI2x120...230VAC'; Sheet 7 detail VERIFIED (ME07 term1=E4.0, ME08 term5=E4.1).

devices.detail: Beckhoff EL9011 E-bus end cap / terminator. No I/O, no cross-ref. Closes the EK1100 node.
devices.evidence: Sheet 5 '-5/A107 / EL9011' in the last dashed box, no '/x.x' beneath. VERIFIED.

devices.detail: Metz Connect 1309426003-E — RJ45 panel feed-through / bulkhead coupler in the ETH-In (upstream/SCU1) path. NOT a media/fibre converter (circle-between-brackets pass-through symbol, no power) — corrects the sheet-7 show-through reading.
devices.evidence: Sheet 5 '-5/U1 / Metz.1309426003-E'; VERIFIED at full res: feed-through connector symbol with -W5445 passing through.

devices.detail: Metz Connect 1309426003-E — RJ45 panel feed-through / bulkhead coupler in the ETH-Out (downstream/SCU3, outdoor) path.
devices.evidence: Sheet 5 '-5/U2 / Metz.1309426003-E'; VERIFIED same feed-through symbol, -W5473 'LAN outdoor'.

devices.detail: Field 'ME05' unit carrying BOTH a PT100 RTD (temperature -> A104 PEW100, via +ME5-1.R:4, detail /11.1) AND a Klixon thermal over-temp switch (230VAC -> A105 E3.0, via -18/X2KL:2, detail /12.0). 'ME' expansion (e.g. Mess-/Motor-Einheit) is inferred, not printed.
devices.evidence: Sheet 6 'ME05 Temperature +ME5-1.R:4 /11.1 PEW100'; Sheet 7 'ME05 Klixon -18/X2KL:2 /12.0 E3.0'. VERIFIED both.
Sheet 6 'ME06 Temperature +ME6-1.R:4 /11.3 PEW102'; Sheet 7 'ME06 Klixon -18/X2KL:4 /12.1 E3.1'. VERIFIED.
Sheet 6 'ME07 Temperature +ME7-1.R:4 /11.6 PEW104'; Sheet 7 'ME07 Klixon -18/X2KL:6 /12.5 E4.0'. VERIFIED.
Sheet 6 'ME08 Temperature +ME8-1.R:4 /11.8 PEW106'; Sheet 7 'ME08 Klixon -18/X2KL:8 /12.6 E4.1'. VERIFIED.

devices.detail: PLC/marshalling station with terminal strips X3/X4/X5; the field-wiring destination/source for A101 DO and A102/A103 DI. Drawn on sheet 13 ('-13/' prefix on every A1-X* reference).
devices.evidence: Sheet 6 repeated targets '-13/A1-X3:*', '-13/A1-X4:*', '-13/A1-X5:*'.

devices.detail: 'Position Bit 1' DIG-OUT source into A103 E1.5. On sheet 20 ('-20/A10:DIG OUT').
devices.evidence: Sheet 6 A103 row '-20/A10:DIG OUT  Position Bit 1'.

devices.detail: 'Position Bit 2' DIG-OUT source into A103 E1.6. On sheet 20 ('-20/A11:DIG OUT').
devices.evidence: Sheet 6 A103 row '-20/A11:DIG OUT  Position Bit 2'.

devices.detail: 'Position Bit 3' DIG-OUT source into A103 E1.7. On sheet 20 ('-20/A12:DIG OUT').
devices.evidence: Sheet 6 A103 row '-20/A12:DIG OUT  Position Bit 3'.

terminals.detail: SCU2 pass-through/tap of the 115V + UPS buses between incoming -W5443 (from +SCU1) and outgoing -W5471 (to +SCU3). Terminals: 1(L), N1(N), PE, 2(UL), N2(UN). Sits at grid 3.2.
Main cabinet PE tie point (grid 3.2). Green: W5443:GNYE in, W5471:GNYE out, plus two off-page PE branches — PE.5DA0/5.5 (to PLC coupler PE on sheet 5) and E1.PE/3.7 (to heater earth, same sheet).
terminals.evidence: Sheet 3 VERIFIED at full res: X0 'PE' circle branches to red arrows 'PE.5DA0 / 5.5' and 'E1.PE / 3.7'.

terminals.detail: UL (UPS line) — W5443:3 / W5471:3; feeds F1 upper pole.
terminals.evidence: Sheet 3 circle '2'; VERIFIED wire to F1.

terminals.detail: UN (UPS neutral) — W5443:4 / W5471:4; feeds F1 lower pole.
terminals.evidence: Sheet 3 circle 'N2'; VERIFIED wire to F1.

terminals.detail: Heater connection strip: 1(L Heizung, from S11:3), N (heater neutral), PE (heater earth -> E1.PE/3.2). Grid 3.7.
+24 V distribution strip, points 1/2/3 bridged; fed from G1(+). Distributes X24V.2->/15.1, X24V.3->/5.4, X24V.4->/20.0. Pt3 spare.
terminals.evidence: Sheet 4 reader '-4/X24VDC' 1/2/3 + orange jumpers. Not re-shot (no conflict).

terminals.detail: 0 V distribution strip, points PE/1/2/3; PE jumpered to pt1 (0V-PE bond); fed from G1(-). Distributes X0V.2->/15.1, X0V.3->/5.4, X0V.4->/20.0.
USV/230V output strip: 1(L, from F3:2 -> 230V_2/18.0), N1, N2(bridged, -> 230V_N2/12.2), PE(-> DA_PE1/12.4 + DA_PE2/12.8).
EtherCAT IN port on EK1100 — upstream side of SCU1->SCU2->SCU3 chain; wired via U1 + W5445 to SCU1.
EtherCAT OUT port on EK1100 — downstream side; wired via U2 + W5473 (LAN outdoor) to SCU3.
EK1100 Us +24V; fed off-page 4.4/X24V.3; jumpered to '+'.
EK1100 Us 0V; fed off-page 4.6/X0V.3; jumpered to '-'.
EK1100 PE; green conductor to 3.2/PE.5DA0 (reciprocal of sheet 3 X0:PE).
terminals.evidence: Sheet 5 'PE' + arrow '3.2 / PE.5DA0'. VERIFIED both ends.

terminals.detail: 230V signal input, address E3.0, from ME05 Klixon (-18/X2KL:2, /12.0).
230V signal input, address E3.1, from ME06 Klixon (-18/X2KL:4, /12.1).
230V neutral to A105 (/12.3).
230V signal input, address E4.0, from ME07 Klixon (-18/X2KL:6, /12.5).
230V signal input, address E4.1, from ME08 Klixon (-18/X2KL:8, /12.6).
230V neutral to A106 (/12.7).

Terminal strip for the ME05-ME08 Klixon field conductors, drawn on sheet 18. Parse of '-18/X2KL:n' is 'sheet 18, strip X2KL, terminal n' (X2KL likely 'terminal block X2, Klemme'). :2=ME05, :4=ME06, :6=ME07, :8=ME08.
terminals.evidence: Sheet 7 VERIFIED '-18/X2KL:2/4/6/8' beside each Klixon label.

terminals.detail: Field RTD sensor terminals (location +ME5..8, device -1, terminal R:4) feeding A104 RTD channels. Detail on sheet 11 (/11.x).

Marshalling terminal strips X3/X4/X5 on station -A1, drawn on sheet 13. X3: DO A1.0(:2)/A1.1(:6) + DI Occupied-Upstream(:9). X4: SensorUnit-Broken + Occupied-Downstream (:2..:6). X5: SensorUnit-occupied (:5..:8).

cables.detail: Incoming from +SCU1. Cores 1=-L, 2=-N, GNYE=-PE, 3=-UL, 4=-UN -> lands on -3/X0. Carries both the 115V mains (L/N) and the UPS pair (UL/UN).
cables.evidence: Sheet 3 '-W5443' with core markers 1/2/GNYE/3/4 and +SCU1/3.x source arrows. VERIFIED core-to-X0 mapping.

cables.detail: 5G2,5mm2 out to +SCU3. Cores 1/2/GNYE/3/4 -> +SCU3 L/N/PE/UL/UN. Continues the 115V + UPS bus to Sensor Control Unit 3.
LAN/EtherCAT cable on the ETH-In side: +SCU1 (net -ETH.D, +SCU1/5.3) -> -5/U1 -> A100 ETH In. Upstream SCU1->SCU2 leg.
cables.evidence: Sheet 5 '-W5445' on the blue net above the +SCU1 arrow. VERIFIED.

cables.detail: LAN cable marked 'LAN / outdoor' on the ETH-Out side: A100 ETH Out -> -5/U2 -> +SCU3 (net +SCU3-ETH.D, +SCU3/5.2). Downstream SCU2->SCU3 leg (outdoor run).

conductors.detail: Cabinet PE; W5443:GNYE -> X0:PE -> W5471:GNYE; branches to PE.5DA0 and E1.PE nets. Green/yellow — kept separate from current-carrying cores.
conductors.evidence: Sheet 3 GNYE core + X0:PE branch. VERIFIED.

conductors.detail: UPS line; W5443:3 -> X0:2 -> W5471:3; also to F1. (Voltage not labelled on sheet 3; the derived net is labelled 230V on sheet 4 — see cross_sheet_notes.)
UPS neutral; W5443:4 -> X0:N2 -> W5471:4; also to F1.
UPS-backed line (USV = Unterbrechungsfreie StromVersorgung). Output of F1 upper pole -> sheet 4.0 (grid 3.7). On sheet 4 feeds G1:L and F3:1.
conductors.evidence: Sheet 3 red arrow 'USVL1 / 4.0'; sheet 4 in-arrow '3.7 / USVL1'. Reciprocal VERIFIED.

conductors.detail: UPS-backed neutral. Output of F1 lower pole -> sheet 4.0 (grid 3.7). On sheet 4 feeds G1:N and (inferred) X2 neutral.
conductors.evidence: Sheet 3 red arrow 'USVN / 4.0'; sheet 4 in-arrow '3.7 / USVN'. Reciprocal VERIFIED.

conductors.detail: +24 V control rail from G1(+) -> X24VDC; distributed X24V.2(/15.1), X24V.3(/5.4->A100 24V), X24V.4(/20.0).
conductors.evidence: Sheet 4 reader; sheet 5 VERIFIED '4.4 / X24V.3' into A100 24V.

conductors.detail: 0 V rail from G1(-) -> X24GND; distributed X0V.2(/15.1), X0V.3(/5.4->A100 0V), X0V.4(/20.0). Bonded to PE at X24GND.
conductors.evidence: Sheet 4 reader; sheet 5 VERIFIED '4.6 / X0V.3' into A100 0V.

conductors.detail: USV/230V line out of F3 pole-1 via X2:1 -> sheet 18 (18.0). Also referenced by the ME Klixon 230V branch.
conductors.evidence: Sheet 4 reader arrow '230V_2 / 18.0' (last digit slightly uncertain).

conductors.detail: F2(Heating) -> S11 common -> S11:3 (Heating contact) -> X1:1 -> E1 heater L. Thermostat-switched.
conductors.evidence: Sheet 3 VERIFIED: F2 bus to S11, wire S11:3 -> X1:1 -> heater.

conductors.detail: EtherCAT/LAN data net from SCU1 (+SCU1/5.3) via W5445+U1 into A100 ETH In.
conductors.evidence: Sheet 5 net '-ETH.D' on the SCU1 column. VERIFIED.

conductors.detail: EtherCAT/LAN data net from A100 ETH Out via U2+W5473 to SCU3 (+SCU3/5.2).
conductors.evidence: Sheet 5 net '+SCU3-ETH.D' on the SCU3 column. VERIFIED.

contacts.detail: Two thermal-magnetic poles mechanically linked (dashed gang): UL pole (X0:2->USVL1) + UN pole (X0:N2->USVN).
contacts.evidence: Sheet 3 VERIFIED 2-pole symbol with dashed link; terminals 1/2 (upper) 3/4 (lower).

contacts.detail: Two ganged poles: L pole (to S10/S11 line) + N pole (heater neutral).
Changeover thermostat: term 3 'Heating' (wired to X1:1) vs term 4 'Cooling' (unused). Only Heating is used on this cabinet.
Hygrostat switching 'Drying'(1)/'Humidif.'(2) outputs against common L(3). Output destinations not shown on this sheet.
contacts.evidence: Sheet 3 terminal labels Drying/Humidif./L imply internal contacts.

contacts.detail: Two ganged thermostatic (Klixon-type) poles; pole 1 (1-2) in the USVL1->230V_2 line; pole 2 (3-4) reads as open stubs on the sheet.
contacts.evidence: Sheet 4 reader '-4/F3' two switch symbols, dashed gang. Pole 2 routing unresolved.

contacts.detail: Field thermal over-temp switches (Klixon), one per ME unit, switching 230V into A105/A106 (E3.0/E3.1/E4.0/E4.1). Contact detail on sheet 12.
contacts.evidence: Sheet 7 'ME0x Klixon' at each EL1722 input. VERIFIED.

power_domains.detail: L/N/PE daisy-chained +SCU1 -> +SCU2 -> +SCU3 via X0; F2 taps L/N for the 250W-115V heater E1. Sheet-3 title 'Versorgung 115V'.

Second L/N pair (UL/UN) carried in W5443/W5471 through X0:2/N2, breakered by F1 (UPS Supply), exported as USVL1/USVN to sheet 4 where it powers G1 (24V PSU) and F3->X2. Labelled 230V on sheet 4 (voltage tension — see notes).
power_domains.evidence: Sheet 3 F1 'UPS Supply' + USVL1/USVN arrows; sheet 4 '3.7/USVL1'. VERIFIED reciprocal.

power_domains.detail: 24 VDC control voltage from G1; +24V on X24V bus, 0V on X0V bus (0V-PE bonded at X24GND); distributed to sheets 5 (PLC coupler), 15, 20.
power_domains.evidence: Sheet 4 reader + sheet 5 VERIFIED A100 fed 4.4/X24V.3 & 4.6/X0V.3.

power_domains.detail: 120...230 VAC domain for the EL1722 digital inputs (A105/A106): each ME Klixon switches 230V-L into a channel; 230V-N common; PE. Field detail on sheet 12.
power_domains.evidence: Sheet 5 'DI2x120...230VAC'; sheet 7 '230V N' + Klixon inputs. VERIFIED.

power_domains.detail: Cabinet PE: X0:PE main tie (grid 3.2) -> PE.5DA0 to PLC coupler (5.5) + E1.PE to heater (3.7); enclosure-bonding strip (RAIL DOOR/CHASSIS/DOOR/MOUNTINGPANEL); 0V-PE bond at X24GND; X2:PE->DA_PE1/DA_PE2; A105/A106 PE. Kept SEPARATE from current-carrying paths throughout.
power_domains.evidence: Sheets 3/4/5 PE terminals + green conductors. VERIFIED reciprocal PE.5DA0.

pe_bonds.detail: Enclosure bond to RAIL DOOR (dedicated PE bonding strip, SEPARATE from current paths).
pe_bonds.evidence: Sheet 3 VERIFIED green wire 'RAIL DOOR' -> terminal 'PE:1'.

pe_bonds.detail: Heater protective-earth net: E1 PE -> X1:PE -> arrow 'E1.PE / 3.2', reciprocated at X0:PE by 'E1.PE / 3.7'. Entirely within sheet 3 (grid 3.2 <-> 3.7). Green loop drawn clear of the L/N path.
pe_bonds.evidence: Sheet 3 VERIFIED both arrows 'E1.PE / 3.7' (at X0:PE) and 'E1.PE / 3.2' (at heater).

pe_bonds.detail: Cabinet PE net from X0:PE (sheet 3, grid 3.2) to EK1100 A100:PE (sheet 5, grid 5.5). Token '5DA0' legible but its meaning (a PE bar/device code) is not established.
pe_bonds.evidence: VERIFIED both ends: sheet 3 'PE.5DA0 / 5.5', sheet 5 '3.2 / PE.5DA0'.

pe_bonds.detail: 24V-supply 0V rail referenced to PE: X24GND PE point jumpered to terminal 1.
pe_bonds.evidence: Sheet 4 reader PE-to-1 link. Not re-shot.

pe_bonds.detail: X2 PE fans out to DA_PE1 (/12.4) and DA_PE2 (/12.8).
pe_bonds.evidence: Sheet 4 reader green branch. Not re-shot.

pe_bonds.detail: PE landed on EL1722 terminal 4 of both A105 (/12.4) and A106 (/12.8).
pe_bonds.evidence: Sheet 7 VERIFIED 'PE' at term 4 of each.

off_page_references.detail: 115V + UPS supply arriving from cabinet +SCU1 (its sheet 3) via cable -W5443 into -3/X0.
off_page_references.evidence: Sheet 3 VERIFIED red in-arrows with these +SCU1/3.x labels per core.

off_page_references.detail: 115V + UPS supply continuing to cabinet +SCU3 (its sheet 3) via cable -W5471 from -3/X0.
RESOLVED reciprocal: sheet 3 X0:PE (grid 3.2) <-> sheet 5 EK1100 A100:PE (grid 5.5). Same net PE.5DA0, verified both ends.
off_page_references.evidence: Sheet 3 'PE.5DA0 / 5.5' and sheet 5 '3.2 / PE.5DA0' — both pixel-verified.

off_page_references.detail: RESOLVED reciprocal, same-sheet: X0:PE (3.2) <-> heater X1:PE/E1 (3.7). Local heater earth net.
RESOLVED reciprocal: F1 output on sheet 3 (grid 3.7) -> sheet 4 (grid 4.0), where USVL1/USVN power G1 and F3.
RESOLVED: 24V/0V from sheet 4 X24VDC/X24GND -> sheet 5 EK1100 (A100 24V at grid 4.4, 0V at grid 4.6). (Sheet-4 side generically labels both '5.4'; sheet-5 side is the precise column.)
USV/230V L to sheet 18; N to sheet 12; two PE conductors to sheet 12. (230V_2 last digit 18.0 vs 18.3 uncertain.)
EtherCAT/LAN continuations: upstream to +SCU1 (its sheet 5, col 3) via W5445/U1; downstream to +SCU3 (its sheet 5, col 2) via W5473/U2. This is the SCU1->SCU2->SCU3 backbone.
Sheet-5 overview modules point to their I/O-detail sheets: A101-A104 detail on sheet 6 (/6.4), A105-A106 detail on sheet 7 (/7.4). This chain is what proves the A105/A106 detail sheet = Blatt 7.
off_page_references.evidence: Sheet 5 VERIFIED '/6.4' x4 and '/7.4' x2; sheet 7 Blatt cell reads 7.

off_page_references.detail: Per-channel continuations from sheet 6: A101 outputs used on sheet 8; A102 DI on sheet 9; A103 DI on sheet 10; A104 RTD on sheet 11.
off_page_references.evidence: Sheet 6 VERIFIED small red '/8.x','/9.x','/10.x','/11.x' beside channels.

off_page_references.detail: Sheet 7 EL1722 wiring continues on sheet 12 (/12.x) via terminal strip X2KL on sheet 18. :2/:4/:6/:8 = ME05/ME06/ME07/ME08 Klixon.
Sheet 6 field/terminal targets: marshalling strips X3/X4/X5 on sheet 13 (station -A1); Position-Bit DO sources -A10/-A11/-A12 on sheet 20; RTD field terminals +ME5..8-1.R:4 (detail sheet 11).

plc_io_channels.evidence: Sheet 6 VERIFIED six 'spare' rows on A101.

plc_io_channels.detail: 'SensorUnit 5 Broken'. From -13/A1-X4:2. /10.0. (NOTE: A103 symbolic addresses E1.0-E1.7 duplicate A102's labels on the overview — real TwinCAT byte addresses must differ; distinguished by card A103 + /10 series.)
'ME05 Temperature' (A104 ch1, term1; return on term2). From +ME5-1.R:4. /11.1.
A105 ch1 = ME05 Klixon over-temp status (120...230VAC). Term1; -18/X2KL:2; /12.0.
A105 ch2 = ME06 Klixon status. Term5; -18/X2KL:4; /12.1.
A106 ch1 = ME07 Klixon status. Term1; -18/X2KL:6; /12.5.
A106 ch2 = ME08 Klixon status. Term5; -18/X2KL:8; /12.6.

network_links.detail: Internal E-bus backplane, left-to-right: A100(EK1100) -> A101(EL2008) -> A102(EL1008) -> A103(EL1008) -> A104(EL3204) -> A105(EL1722) -> A106(EL1722) -> A107(EL9011 end cap). One contiguous Beckhoff node at +SCU2.
network_links.evidence: Sheet 5 single dashed assembly enclosure spanning A100..A107. VERIFIED lineup + EL9011 terminator.

network_links.detail: +SCU1/5.3 (-ETH.D) -> cable -W5445 -> connector -5/U1 -> A100 ETH In. The SCU1->SCU2 leg.
A100 ETH Out -> connector -5/U2 -> cable -W5473 ('LAN outdoor') -> +SCU3/5.2 (+SCU3-ETH.D). The SCU2->SCU3 leg.
network_links.evidence: Sheet 5 VERIFIED red net + '-W5473 LAN outdoor' + '+SCU3/5.2 / +SCU3-ETH.D'.

functional_paths.name: 115 VAC anti-condensation heater branch
sequence: -3/E1 N -> -3/X1:N -> system neutral (via F2 2nd pole; upstream tie faint)
functional_paths.description: Mains L is broken by the 2-pole 'Heating' MCB F2, feeds the common of the Rittal hygrostat S10 (Drying/Humidif) and thermostat S11; when S11 calls for heat its 'Heating' contact (term 3) passes L to X1:1 and the 250W/115V heater E1. Neutral returns via X1:N (F2's second pole); PE via a separate green loop X1:PE -> E1.PE. Cooling (S11:4) is unused.
functional_paths.evidence: Sheet 3 pixel-verified: F2 2-pole symbol, S10/S11 dashed controllers, S11:3->X1:1 wire, E1 250W-115V, green PE loop, E1.PE/3.2 arrow.
open_items: exact X1:N upstream tie to system N not cleanly traceable (faint, merges with sub-assembly boundary)

functional_paths.name: 24 VDC control supply
sequence: -4/X24VDC (+24V, pts1-3 bridged) / -4/X24GND (0V, pts PE-1-2-3 bridged, 0V-PE bond)
functional_paths.description: The UPS-backed line (USVL1/USVN), created by breaker F1 from the UL/UN pair on sheet 3, powers the Phoenix Contact 24V PSU G1 on sheet 4. G1's +24V/0V are distributed on the X24VDC/X24GND strips (0V referenced to PE) and fanned out to sheets 15, 5 (the EtherCAT coupler), and 20.
functional_paths.evidence: Sheet 4 reader + pixel-verified reciprocal cross-refs: sheet3 USVL1/USVN->4.0; sheet5 A100 fed 4.4/X24V.3 & 4.6/X0V.3.
open_items: sheet 4 not re-photographed by adjudicator (no conflict); X2 neutral source + F3 pole-2 routing flagged by reader

functional_paths.name: EtherCAT I/O station (SCU1->SCU2->SCU3)
sequence: A100 EK1100 (24V/0V from sheet 4; PE via PE.5DA0 to sheet 3)
functional_paths.description: A single Beckhoff EtherCAT node reads the cabinet's sensor I/O and passes the fieldbus through to the next cabinet. I/O carried: A101(DO) SensorUnits-off + Position-Bits-on; A102(DI) SensorUnit 5-8 occupied + Occupied Upstream; A103(DI) SensorUnit 5-8 Broken + Occupied Downstream + Position Bit 1/2/3 (from -A10/-A11/-A12 on sheet 20); A104(RTD) ME05-ME08 Temperature; A105/A106(230VAC DI) ME05-ME08 Klixon over-temp. Each ME05-08 unit therefore lands TWICE: an RTD on A104 (analog, sheet 11 detail) and a Klixon on A105/A106 (digital over-temp, sheet 12 detail).
functional_paths.evidence: Sheets 5/6/7 all pixel-verified: module lineup, U1/U2 feed-throughs, ETH In/Out routing, full I/O label set.
open_items: A102 vs A103 share symbolic E1.0-E1.7 (real TwinCAT addresses differ)
channel field detail on sheets 8/9/10/11/12/13/18/20 not in this set

functional_paths.name: 230 VAC Klixon sensing sub-branch
functional_paths.description: The USV/230V output (X2 on sheet 4) supplies the ME Klixon loop: each thermal switch, when closed, returns 230V to an EL1722 channel; 230V-N and PE are common. Wiring detail is on sheet 12 via strip X2KL (sheet 18).
functional_paths.evidence: Sheet 7 pixel-verified '230V N', PE, and -18/X2KL:2/4/6/8 + /12.x; sheet 4 X2 230V outputs.
open_items: voltage-domain tension: sheet-3 system titled 115V but the USV-derived net is labelled 230V on sheets 4/7 — UL/UN voltage not labelled on sheet 3

physical_layout_matches.layout_feature: Slim multi-module DIN-rail row across the top band of the front elevation (grainy, ~10+ narrow divisions, orange busbar exit)
physical_layout_matches.basis: Form-factor of a Beckhoff EtherCAT terminal row only
physical_layout_matches.needed_to_confirm: A readable module tag (EK1100/EL####) on the layout; none legible.

physical_layout_matches.layout_feature: Solid copper busbar on standoff insulators running diagonally (isometric) / horizontally (front)
physical_layout_matches.candidate_schematic_device: PE/earth bar OR a power-distribution bar
physical_layout_matches.needed_to_confirm: A PE/label marking; could equally be power distribution.

physical_layout_matches.layout_feature: Multi-level colour-coded terminal-block stacks in the centre band (blue / green-yellow / orange / grey)
physical_layout_matches.basis: A cluster of feed-through terminal strips; green-yellow implies PE by colour convention

physical_layout_matches.layout_feature: Small rectangular block (front-right) / block in isometric
Row of identical white single-pole DIN modules with square windows (centre)
physical_layout_matches.needed_to_confirm: Readable ratings/tag; F1/F2 are sheet 3, F3 sheet 4 — cannot tell which.

physical_layout_matches.layout_feature: ~14 cable glands on the bottom gland plate (~10 left incl. 2 larger + 4 right)
physical_layout_matches.candidate_schematic_device: Field cable entries (-W5443, -W5471, -W5445, -W5473, ME05-08 sensor cables, etc.)
physical_layout_matches.basis: Glands are where field cables enter; count approximate
physical_layout_matches.needed_to_confirm: Cable tags at glands; none shown on the layout sheet.

cross_sheet_notes:
SET IDENTITY: AP31971 (doc 31971), '=LA2 +SCU2' Sensor Control Unit 2 V3.5, project 'Hyper Launch', customer Mack (Mack Rides), by INTRASYS, Orlando FL. This is one of a 3-cabinet chain +SCU1 -> +SCU2 -> +SCU3. Every sheet prints 'von 1706' (verified) — treat as printed; the value is oddly high for a page count and may be an order/document code (flagged in unresolved).

SHEET NUMBERING (all pixel-verified): 3 = 115V supply/heater (Gruenzinger, 23.09.2022); 4 = 24V supply (Ascher, 11.07.2022); 5 = PLC overview / EtherCAT node A100-A107 (Ascher); 6 = I/O map A101-A104 (Ascher); 7 = 230V DI A105/A106 Klixon (Ascher). The Montageplatte layout is a separate early sheet (Gruenzinger, 18.03.2022), Blatt cell blurry. Note the author/date split: Gruenzinger did the early layout + the 115V/heater sheet; Ascher did the 24V + all PLC sheets.

KEY CORRECTION vs the blind reads — SHEET 7 IS NOT TWO SUPERIMPOSED DRAWINGS. At normal exposure PXL_...150455846 is a single clean drawing (upper ~60% blank) whose corner reads 'Blatt 7 / von 1706' (pixel-verified). The 'faint node-overview layer B' the reader recovered via autocontrast was bleed-through from the adjacent sheet 5 (which authoritatively carries A100-A107, U1/U2, W5445/W5473, ETH In/Out). All 'layer-B' items were therefore NOT double-counted here; the node overview is attributed solely to sheet 5.

RESOLVED CROSS-REFERENCES (reciprocals verified on both sheets where possible):
- PE.5DA0: sheet3 X0:PE grid 3.2  <->  sheet5 EK1100 A100:PE grid 5.5 (sheet3 prints 'PE.5DA0/5.5', sheet5 prints '3.2/PE.5DA0').
- E1.PE (heater earth): sheet3 X0:PE grid 3.2  <->  sheet3 heater X1:PE grid 3.7 (same-sheet net).
- USVL1/USVN: sheet3 F1 output grid 3.7  <->  sheet4 grid 4.0 (sheet3 'USVL1/4.0','USVN/4.0'; sheet4 '3.7/USVL1','3.7/USVN').
- 24V/0V: sheet4 X24VDC/X24GND  ->  sheet5 EK1100 (A100 24V at 4.4/X24V.3, 0V at 4.6/X0V.3).
- EtherCAT: sheet5 -> +SCU1/5.3(-ETH.D) upstream (W5445/U1) and +SCU3/5.2(+SCU3-ETH.D) downstream (W5473/U2).
- Module detail chain: sheet5 A101-A104 -> /6.4 (sheet 6); A105-A106 -> /7.4 (sheet 7). This chain is the proof that the A105/A106 sheet = Blatt 7.

DEVICE-NAMING: the PLC modules are printed '-5/A100'..'-5/A107','-5/U1','-5/U2' on ALL three PLC sheets; '-5/' is the sheet-5 (PLC-overview) location/cross-ref marker, kept as the literal visible tag.

CROSS-SIGNAL DESIGN (verified sheets 6 & 7): every field unit ME05, ME06, ME07, ME08 provides BOTH a PT100 RTD (analog temperature -> A104 EL3204 PEW100/102/104/106, field term +MEx-1.R:4, detail sheet 11) AND a Klixon thermal over-temp switch (digital 230VAC -> A105/A106 EL1722 E3.0/E3.1/E4.0/E4.1, field strip -18/X2KL:2/4/6/8, detail sheet 12). Continuous temperature + hard over-temp trip per unit.

U1/U2 TYPE (resolved from pixels): Metz Connect 1309426003-E are RJ45 panel feed-through / bulkhead connectors (circle-between-brackets pass-through symbol, no power/converter) — NOT media/fibre converters as the sheet-7 show-through read suggested.

PE DISCIPLINE: PE is kept strictly separate from current-carrying paths in this graph — the enclosure-bonding strip (RAIL DOOR/CHASSIS/DOOR/MOUNTINGPANEL/spare), the X0:PE main tie, PE.5DA0, E1.PE, the X24GND 0V-PE bond, X2:PE->DA_PE1/DA_PE2, and A105/A106 PE are all recorded as pe_bonds / pe nets, never merged into L/N/UL/UN conductors.

VOLTAGE TENSION (open): sheet 3 is titled 'Versorgung 115V' and E1 is 250W-115V, but the UPS-derived net (UL/UN -> F1 -> USVL1/USVN) is labelled '230V' on sheets 4 and 7. UL/UN voltage is not labelled on sheet 3. Likely the cable carries a 115V mains pair (L/N) AND a separate 230V UPS pair (UL/UN); recorded as observed, not resolved.

CONFIDENCE POSTURE: all items 'proposed'. Items I re-opened and confirmed at full resolution (sheet 3 PE/heater/F1, sheet 5 station/network/PE, sheets 6/7 I/O map) carry 0.85-0.96; sheet 4 (no conflict, not re-shot) carries the reader's values; the layout matches are CANDIDATES only (0.25-0.35) because no tags are legible.
